description: Program-memory v3 scoped insight packet ready for synthesis agents.

required_fields.name: packet_question
required_fields.description: Exact question the packet is meant to answer.

required_fields.name: scope_summary
required_fields.description: Short scope definition for the packet.

required_fields.name: program_ids
required_fields.description: Program identifiers included in the packet.

required_fields.name: evidence_artifacts
required_fields.description: Explicit evidence artifacts included in the packet.

required_fields.name: candidate_insights
required_fields.description: Structured candidate insights returned by synthesis.
